input:
"#CONTEXT#
You are a B2B sales strategist writing a GTM intelligence memo for a sales team. You will receive information about:
1. A client company whose product is being sold
2. A lead who previously worked at a company that is a known customer of the client
3. The lead's current company where they now hold a relevant role

The lead's past company is a known customer of the client. The lead held a relevant role there and would have been exposed to or aware of the client's product. They have since moved to a new company in a similar or more senior role."

"#INPUTS#
client_company_name: Nostra
client_company_domain: nostra.ai
client_company_description: Nostra helps the world’s leading ecommerce brands future-proof their digital infrastructure with cutting-edge edge technology. We enable high-growth DTC companies to deploy enterprise-grade infrastructure in minutes, not months. Our edge platform is designed to accelerate site speed, increase conversion rates, and drive more revenue, while protecting your brand from modern threats. With products like Edge Delivery Engine, Edge Protection, Edge ID, and Edge Crawler, we give brands the tools to: • Boost performance by 20–30% • Block ad bot traffic before it hits your site • Extend cookie life for better attribution • Optimize content for LLM indexing and AI-native search Brands like Jolie, Amiri, and Olukai rely on Nostra to deliver faster, safer, smarter ecommerce experiences

lead_full_name: Stephanie S.
lead_linkedin_url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stephanie-s-96872612
lead_current_job_title: Vice President Marketing
lead_current_company_name: Beauty Creations Cosmetics
lead_current_company_domain: beautycreationscosmetics.com
lead_current_company_description: From trends to our favorite influencers, our products are inspired by all our BC Babes. Developed exclusively in-house, Beauty Creations delivers products for everyone! 

Beauty Creations is founded by our CEO Esmeralda Hernandez; an innovator and creator behind this fast growing beauty company, along with parent company Bebella Cosmetics. Growing up with a single parent mother her career began at a young age. Esmeralda started working with her mother at the swap meets at age 12 and by age 15, she was running her business in the perfume and hair industry. She realized that her true passion was in beauty. Being Latina woman in business she saw that there was a market that was being neglected. Her experience of working at the swap meets, she saw that the demand for beauty at an affordable cost was being missed. Coming across people who had the same love for beauty but unable to afford luxury she cultivated a line that was created with quality, without breaking the bank. Beauty Creations was made to be a line as CEO, Esmeralda says “ selling her oranges to everyone” changing the market, by allowing Beauty Creations to be accessible to everyone. 

We will continue to redefine the beauty industry one product at a time through inspiration, creation and passion. Currently, our products are cruelty-free with a line expanding from Eyes, Lips, Face, SKIN, hair tools, vanities and Exclusive Collections. We want our BC babes to feel inspired, and have the freedom to express their inner girl boss attitude. This is just the beginning for Beauty Creations, we hope you can enjoy this ride with us because we aren’t stopping.

lead_past_company_name: Forever 21
lead_past_company_domain: forever21.com
lead_past_company_description: Forever 21 continues to be a fashion industry leader with a mission to make the latest trends accessible to all. F21 persists on staying ahead of innovation and providing styles and fit that our customers love. While reinventing for now and beyond, we’re seeking passionate and creative new family members to join us on this adventure! F21 continues to operate E-commerce and 450 locations across the U.S. along with maintaining a strong brand DNA with consumers and within the fashion industry. 

In February 2020, Forever 21 came under new ownership made up of Simon Property Group, Brookfield Property Partners, and Authentic Brands Group. Under this new ownership F21 has the financial strength and long term view that will prepare us for the future, while continuing to set the same high standards as it always has. Join our team and learn the inner sanctum of the global fashion industry, while we build the new Forever 21! 

Forever 21 is operated by SPARC Group LLC.
 
About SPARC Group LLC
SPARC Group LLC offers operational and strategic expertise including retail and e-commerce management, sourcing, design and technology for leading global brands. SPARC Group is a joint venture between Simon Property Group, a preeminent retail real estate company and Authentic Brands Group, a global leader in brand development. In addition to Forever 21, SPARC Group brands include Aéropostale, Brooks Brothers, Nautica, Eddie Bauer, and Lucky Brand.
 
SPARC Group LLC is an equal opportunity employer, and is committed to maintaining a workplace free from prohibited employment conduct, including discrimination or harassment on the basis of race, color, national origin, sex, age, religion, disability, genetic information, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, civil partnership, status as a covered veteran, status in the Uniformed Services of the United States, citizenship and any other characteristic protected by law.
lead_past_company_job_title: Manager, Visual Merchandising and Marketing"

"#OBJECTIVE#
Generate a 5-section GTM strategy memo that helps a sales rep understand why this lead is a high-value target right now and exactly how to approach them.

#RESEARCH DIRECTIVES#
Before writing the memo, research the following:

1. **Current company business context** — What is the current company's scale, market position, ecommerce footprint, and growth trajectory? What operational or technical challenges would a company like this face? What about their stage creates urgency for the client's product?

2. **Competitive landscape** — Who are the current company's direct competitors? What market pressure do they face? How does site performance, conversion optimization, or digital infrastructure factor into their competitive position?

3. **Lead's role and authority** — Based on their title and the company context, what does this person own? What decisions do they influence or control? Why are they the right person to talk to about the client's product?

4. **The alumni signal** — The lead previously held a relevant role at a company that uses the client's product. What would they have seen or experienced there? How does that experience translate to their current situation?

5. **Complexity delta** — How do the challenges at the current company compare to the past company? Are they dealing with more brands, more SKUs, more markets, more traffic, more complexity? Frame the current situation relative to what they've already navigated.

#OUTPUT FORMAT#
Write a 5-section memo in sharp, conversational prose. No bullet points. No headers beyond the section names. Each section should be a tight paragraph.

**OVERVIEW**
2-3 sentences. Who is this person, what is their current role, and what is their connection to the client's customer base. State the alumni signal clearly.

**MARKET POSITION**
One paragraph. The current company's business context — scale, growth stage, competitive pressure, and why their digital infrastructure matters right now. What is at stake for them?

**RELEVANCE & READINESS**
One paragraph. Why this specific person. What did they see or own at their past company? What do they own now? Why would they recognize the value of the client's product immediately?

**RECOMMENDED APPROACH**
One paragraph. The specific angle for outreach. Include a sample message or talk track that references the alumni connection and speaks to the current company's situation. Make it concrete, not generic.

**TAKEAWAY**
One sentence. The verdict — why this lead matters and the urgency level.

#STYLE GUIDANCE#
- Be direct and specific. No filler, no hedge words.
- Do not fabricate metrics, quotes, or claims. Only infer plausibly from the inputs and your research.
- Do not claim the lead directly used or implemented the client's product unless you have evidence. Frame it as exposure and awareness based on their role.
- The memo should read like it was written by someone who understands the market, not by an AI summarizing inputs.
- Total length: 300-400 words.

Output Schema
json{
  ""overview"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""2-3 sentences. Who is this person, their current role, and their alumni connection to the client's customer base.""
  },
  ""market_position"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on the current company's business context, competitive pressure, and why digital infrastructure matters now.""
  },
  ""relevance_and_readiness"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph on why this specific person — what they saw at the past company, what they own now, why they'd recognize value immediately.""
  },
  ""recommended_approach"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One paragraph with the specific outreach angle and sample messaging that references the alumni connection.""
  },
  ""takeaway"": {
    ""type"": ""string"",
    ""description"": ""One sentence verdict on why this lead matters and urgency level.""
  }
}"

overview.current_position: Vice President of Marketing at Beauty Creations Cosmetics
overview.alumni_signal: Stephanie S. previously held a leadership role in visual merchandising and marketing at Forever 21, an enterprise retailer that is a documented customer of Nostra. During her tenure, she would have been exposed to the significant performance and SEO improvements that Nostra's platform delivered for Forever 21.

market_position.company_profile: Beauty Creations Cosmetics is a fast-growing, value-priced color cosmetics brand headquartered in Santa Fe Springs, California. The company, founded in 2016, operates in a growth stage with a lean team of 51-200 employees. It targets the affordable makeup segment, with most products priced between $4 and $25, competing with brands like LA Colors and Kokie Cosmetics.
market_position.revenue_and_growth: The company has demonstrated rapid scaling, with projected sales of $60 million in 2023, a significant increase from $43 million the previous year. This growth is supported by a robust distribution network of 38 global distributors and an expanding retail presence in major U.S. stores, including Urban Outfitters, Aerie, and upcoming rollouts in Forever 21 and H-E-B.
market_position.ecommerce_footprint: Beauty Creations' digital presence is centered around a Shopify storefront and a dedicated iOS mobile app. Third-party data estimates their monthly web visits are approximately 175,000. This substantial traffic indicates that their direct-to-consumer (DTC) channel is a critical component of their business model, making on-site conversion efficiency and user experience paramount to their continued growth.
market_position.strategic_challenge: As Beauty Creations scales rapidly in the crowded and competitive affordable cosmetics market, its primary strategic challenge is maintaining growth momentum. This requires maximizing the efficiency of its digital channels. Key pressure points include managing customer acquisition costs, improving on-site conversion rates, ensuring fast site speed for better Core Web Vitals, and achieving high SEO visibility. Protecting their digital ad spend and revenue from bot traffic and ad waste is also a critical operational concern that directly impacts profitability and growth.

relevance_and_readiness.past_experience_context: During her time at Forever 21, Stephanie would have been exposed to the tangible benefits of Nostra's platform. Nostra's implementation at Forever 21 resulted in a 53% reduction in Time to First Byte (TTFB), a 59% acceleration in page load times, and a 166% increase in crawl speed. These are significant, publicly validated metrics that directly impact user experience, SEO, and ultimately, revenue, which she would have been aware of in her marketing and merchandising role.
relevance_and_readiness.current_role_authority: As the Vice President of Marketing at Beauty Creations, Stephanie likely owns the outcomes for both brand and growth marketing. Her responsibilities would involve close collaboration with e-commerce and engineering teams on key business drivers such as revenue generation, SEO performance, and marketing attribution. Nostra's solutions—including its Edge Delivery Engine for speed, crawler optimization, bot filtering, and cookie extension for attribution—directly address and improve the KPIs she is accountable for.
relevance_and_readiness.problem_awareness_level: Stephanie is uniquely prepared to recognize the value of Nostra's solution. Her tenure at Forever 21 provided her with firsthand awareness of how Nostra can solve performance and traffic challenges at scale. Now at a rapidly growing Shopify-based DTC brand with expanding wholesale channels, she is facing a similar, albeit smaller-scale, set of challenges. This past experience primes her to immediately grasp the potential upside of implementing Nostra to boost site performance, organic traffic, and paid ROAS for Beauty Creations.

recommended_approach.outreach_theme: The core strategic angle is to lead with the strong alumni connection to Forever 21, immediately referencing the specific, impressive performance metrics Nostra achieved there. This establishes credibility and familiarity, then bridges directly to the current scaling needs and growth trajectory of Beauty Creations, positioning Nostra as a proven solution for their present challenges.
recommended_approach.sample_subject_line: Replicating the F21 lift at Beauty Creations?
recommended_approach.sample_message_body: Stephanie—at F21, your team saw Nostra cut TTFB by 53%, speed pages by 59%, and increase crawl speed 166%. Beauty Creations is hitting its next stage—more drops, wholesale rollouts, and a Shopify site + app to feed. We can ship the same edge delivery and crawler optimization in days, lifting Core Web Vitals, organic traffic, and paid ROAS while filtering bot/ad waste. If we could replicate even part of the F21 lift, what would that mean for Q2 launches and retail sell-in? Open to a 20-minute pass on your PDP/collection templates so we can show projected gains?

takeaway.summary_verdict: This is a high-fit lead due to her direct exposure to Nostra’s proven impact at a previous company (Forever 21) and the immediate, tangible upside Nostra's platform offers for her current company, a scaling, Shopify-based DTC brand that competes on speed, SEO, and conversion.

citations.title: How Forever 21 Improved Website Performance & Traffic with Nostra AI
excerpts: Forever 21 faced site speed challenges that impacted user experience and conversion rates, such as high bounce rates from slow page loads, reduced user engagement, and difficulties handling traffic surges during peak times.
The impact of Nostra AI's solutions on Forever 21's website speed and efficiency was remarkable.

53% reduction in** [**Time to First Byte (TTFB)**](https://www.nostra.ai/blogs-collection/ttfb-why-it-matters-and-how-to-improve-it) **:** This metric measures the time it takes for a user's browser to receive the first byte of data from the server, indicating a significant improvement in initial page load speed.
59% acceleration in page load:** This substantial decrease in page load time directly translates to a better user experience, reduced bounce rates, and increased engagement.

166% increase in crawl speed:** This improvement in crawl speed means that search engines can index Forever 21's pages more quickly and efficiently, leading to better visibility in search results and increased organic traffic.
Forever 21 partnered with Nostra with a test and learn approach to Nostra’s solution to drive site perfomance KPIs.
rioritize website speed and user experience:** These factors are crucial for success in the competitive e-commerce landscape

citations.title: Nostra AI Raises $8.9M to Boost E-Commerce Performance | High Alpha
excerpts: ith enterprise customer momentum including fashion retailer Forever 21, Nostra AI’s Edge Delivery Engine™ showcases immediate impact on core website metrics

citations.title: Nostra.ai - Resources
excerpts: Case Study. Forever 21 Accelerates Website Performance and Boosts Organic Traffic with Nostra AI. Ryan Hofmann @Forever 21. Blog. Strategic Shopify SEO Guide ...Read more

outputBasis.reasoning: The strongest support comes from case-study and success-story content that directly links Forever 21 with Nostra AI, illustrating tangible performance gains such as faster page loads, reduced TTFB, and accelerated crawl speeds. These excerpts collectively demonstrate how Nostra’s Edge Delivery Engine produced measurable improvements at a prominent, known customer in the same fashion-constrained e-commerce space, which aligns with the alumni signal: the lead previously observed such impact at Forever 21 and now operates at Beauty Creations Cosmetics, a growing DTC brand that would benefit from similar performance and reliability improvements. Specifically, excerpts detailing reduced time to first byte, faster page loads, and increased crawl speed give concrete evidence of the kind of outcomes the lead would recognize from her past exposure, reinforcing the premise that she would readily appreciate the value of the client’s product in her current role. The excerpt referencing Forever 21’s broader momentum with Nostra adds corroborating context about ongoing customer traction. The other excerpts that describe Forever 21’s case and general site-performance emphasis further substantiate the relevance, while the remaining excerpts provide supportive context about Forever 21’s branding and partnerships but do not directly demonstrate the product outcomes. Together, these excerpts form a coherent link from the alumni signal to a high-urgency, high-value outreach strategy.

outputBasis.reasoning: The core outreach argument is to lead with the alumni signal by referencing concrete performance gains Nostra achieved for Forever 21, then tying those gains to Beauty Creations’ current scale and growth trajectory. Excerpts detailing Forever 21’s site speed and performance improvements directly support claims that Nostra AI can meaningfully accelerate similar ecommerce sites. For example, the material describes a 53% reduction in Time to First Byte, a 59% improvement in page load speed, and a 166% increase in crawl speed, illustrating tangible impact on core Web Vitals and SEO visibility. This concrete success at a well-known client provides credibility for an outreach that positions Nostra as a proven, rapid-deployment edge solution tailored to high-traffic, multi-market brands. Additional context outlining Forever 21’s ongoing momentum and the broader client roster reinforces the relevance of this alumni signal to Beauty Creations’ own upcoming launches, wholesale expansion, and Shopify stack considerations. The combination of the alumni connection and replicated performance narrative creates a compelling, credible hook for the outreach, anchoring the value proposition in proven metrics rather than abstractions. The most compelling pieces are those that explicitly quantify improvements and name Forever 21 as a customer, followed by content that situates Beauty Creations’ growth needs in a comparable frame and notes scalable deployment timelines.

Excerpts that describe these exact improvements anchor the alumni signal, showing what the lead would have witnessed in marketing and merchandising roles at Forever 21. citations.title: On Track To Hit $60M In Sales This Year, Beauty Creations Broadens Its Business With Skincare, Stores, Manufacturing And More | Beauty Independent
excerpts: Beauty Creations has 38 distributors across the globe. Mexico is the brand’s top market, where it’s sold in the department store Coppel, and the U.S. is its second-largest market. Beauty Creations is available at Urban Outfitters and Aerie in the U.S. and will soon roll out to Forever 21 and H-E-B. Glancing ahead at Beauty Creations’ wholesale roadmap, Hernandez’s dream American partners for it are CVS, Walmart, Walgreens and Target.
The brand is projected to reach $60 million in sales this year, up from $43 million last year.

Beauty Creations has 38 distributors across the globe. Mexico is the brand’s top market, where it’s sold in the department store Coppel, and the U.S. is its second-largest market. Beauty Creations is available at Urban Outfitters and Aerie in the U.S. and will soon roll out to Forever 21 and H-E-B. Glancing ahead at Beauty Creations’ wholesale roadmap, Hernandez’s dream American partners for it are CVS, Walmart, Walgreens and Target.

Beauty Creations has taken Hernandez far from her humble business roots. Beginning at 12 years old, she hawked merchandise with her mom at swap meets—and was extremely savvy at it. She figured out how to move Barbie doll units better by clothing them in beautiful Mexican handmade dresses. At 19 years old, Hernandez, now a mom of three, got pregnant, and college became untenable for her. Instead, she ventured into the beauty industry by selling perfumes. In 2014, she established the brand [BeBella](https://bebellacosmetics.com/) with hair straighteners, but the effective hair straighteners made repeat sales tricky, and she transitioned it to replenishable makeup.

Additional context about the brand’s ecommerce footprint—centered on a Shopify storefront and a sizeable monthly web visit figure—helps explain how digital infrastructure supports market presence. Content about current ecommerce channels and partners adds depth to the market position by illustrating where and how the brand competes. Background details on the brand’s reach through global distributors and top markets bolster the assessment of market position, while information about the founder’s story provides context but is less central to current market metrics. Overall, the cited excerpts collectively map to scale (distributors and sales), multi-channel reach (retail partners and stores), and digital footprint (ecommerce and traffic) which are the key pillars of Beauty Creations’ market_position as described in the finegrained field value.

citations.title: On Track To Hit $60M In Sales This Year, Beauty Creations Broadens Its Business With Skincare, Stores, Manufacturing And More | Beauty Independent
excerpts: Beauty Creations has 38 distributors across the globe. Mexico is the brand’s top market, where it’s sold in the department store Coppel, and the U.S. is its second-largest market. Beauty Creations is available at Urban Outfitters and Aerie in the U.S. and will soon roll out to Forever 21 and H-E-B. Glancing ahead at Beauty Creations’ wholesale roadmap, Hernandez’s dream American partners for it are CVS, Walmart, Walgreens and Target.

Beauty Creations has 38 distributors across the globe. Mexico is the brand’s top market, where it’s sold in the department store Coppel, and the U.S. is its second-largest market. Beauty Creations is available at Urban Outfitters and Aerie in the U.S. and will soon roll out to Forever 21 and H-E-B. Glancing ahead at Beauty Creations’ wholesale roadmap, Hernandez’s dream American partners for it are CVS, Walmart, Walgreens and Target.
The brand is projected to reach $60 million in sales this year, up from $43 million last year.

Beauty Creations has taken Hernandez far from her humble business roots. Beginning at 12 years old, she hawked merchandise with her mom at swap meets—and was extremely savvy at it. She figured out how to move Barbie doll units better by clothing them in beautiful Mexican handmade dresses. At 19 years old, Hernandez, now a mom of three, got pregnant, and college became untenable for her. Instead, she ventured into the beauty industry by selling perfumes. In 2014, she established the brand [BeBella](https://bebellacosmetics.com/) with hair straighteners, but the effective hair straighteners made repeat sales tricky, and she transitioned it to replenishable makeup.

lead_name.description: The full name of the lead.

current_position.description: The lead's current job title and company.

alumni_signal.description: A summary of the lead's connection to a past company that is a client customer.

company_profile.description: A brief profile of the lead's current company, including its market segment and growth stage.

revenue_and_growth.description: Specific details on the company's revenue, growth trajectory, and expansion.

ecommerce_footprint.description: Information about the company's e-commerce platform and its importance to their business model.

strategic_challenge.description: The key operational or technical challenge the company faces due to its growth, making the client's solution relevant.

past_experience_context.description: Describes what the lead would have been exposed to at their past company regarding the client's product and its benefits.

current_role_authority.description: Explains what the lead owns or influences in their current role that makes them the right person to contact.

problem_awareness_level.description: Assesses why the lead is uniquely prepared to recognize the value of the client's solution in their new role.

outreach_theme.description: The core strategic angle for the outreach message.

sample_subject_line.description: A concrete example of an email subject line.

sample_message_body.description: A sample talk track or email body that references the alumni connection and current situation.

summary_verdict.description: The final verdict on why this lead is a high-value target.

urgency_level.description: The recommended urgency for acting on this lead (e.g., High, Medium, Low).
